tasks.title: Setup Project Repository and Infrastructure
tasks.description: Initialize the project repository with the required tech stack and configure the development environment.
tasks.details:
1. Create a new GitHub repository for the AutoProof project
2. Set up the frontend with React 18, TypeScript 5.0+, and Tailwind CSS 3.3+
3. Set up the backend with FastAPI 0.100.0+ and Python 3.9+
4. Configure Docker and Docker Compose for local development
5. Set up GitHub Actions for CI/CD pipeline
6. Configure linting and formatting tools (ESLint, Prettier for frontend; Black, isort for backend)
7. Create README.md with project overview and setup instructions
8. Set up environment variables management using dotenv for development and secure vaults for production
9. Initialize the project structure following best practices for both frontend and backend components
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all development dependencies are correctly installed and the application builds without errors. Test the Docker setup by running the containers and ensuring they communicate properly. Validate CI/CD pipeline by making a test commit and ensuring checks pass.

tasks.title: Database Schema Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the database schema as specified in the PRD using Supabase PostgreSQL.
tasks.details:
1. Set up Supabase project for development environment
2. Implement the core tables as specified in the PRD:
   - policy_rules
   - violation_logs
   - usage_logs
3. Add additional required tables:
   - teams
   - users
   - integrations
   - api_keys
4. Set up proper indexes for performance optimization
5. Implement foreign key constraints and cascading rules
6. Configure row-level security policies for multi-tenant data isolation
7. Set up database migrations using Alembic
8. Create seed data for development and testing
9. Implement backup and restore procedures
10. Document the schema with entity-relationship diagrams
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that all tables are created correctly with proper constraints. Test CRUD operations on each table. Validate that indexes improve query performance. Test row-level security by attempting to access data across team boundaries. Verify that migrations work correctly both forward and backward.

subtasks.title: Supabase Project Setup
subtasks.description: Initialize and configure the Supabase project for the development environment, ensuring alignment with existing migration structure.
subtasks.details:
Follow Supabase CLI best practices. Ensure the project is set up to use declarative schemas and migration tools. Validate by running a test migration and confirming connectivity.
<info added on 2025-07-19T11:27:31.015Z>
Create a Supabase migration script for the missing compliance tables based on the current implementation analysis. The migration should include:

1. A `policy_rules` table with fields for:
   - Rule ID (primary key)
   - Team ID (foreign key to teams table)
   - Rule name
   - Rule description
   - Rule type/category
   - Rule parameters/configuration
   - Created at timestamp
   - Updated at timestamp
   - Status (active/inactive)

2. Ensure proper relationships between:
   - The new policy_rules table and existing teams table
   - The new policy_rules table and violation_logs table

3. Implement row-level security policies for the new tables to maintain multi-tenant data isolation

4. Add appropriate indexes for performance optimization on frequently queried fields

5. Verify alignment between the SQLAlchemy models and the Supabase schema to ensure consistency between the application code and database structure.
</info added on 2025-07-19T11:27:31.015Z>

subtasks.title: Implement Core Compliance Tables
subtasks.description: Design and create the core compliance tables: policy_rules, violation_logs, and usage_logs.
subtasks.details: Define schema standards (naming, types, relationships). Use SQL files in the supabase/schemas directory. Validate by reviewing schema definitions and running test migrations.

subtasks.title: Implement Team Management Tables
subtasks.description: Design and create missing team management tables: teams, users, integrations, and api_keys.
subtasks.details: Follow schema standards for multi-tenancy and relationships. Use declarative schema files. Validate by checking relationships and constraints after migration.

subtasks.title: Define and Apply Indexes
subtasks.description: Identify and implement indexes for performance optimization on frequently queried columns.
subtasks.details: Specify index naming conventions and index types. Add index definitions to schema files. Validate by running EXPLAIN on key queries.

subtasks.title: Implement Constraints and Cascading Rules
subtasks.description: Add foreign key constraints, unique constraints, and cascading rules to enforce data integrity.
subtasks.details: Document constraint standards. Define constraints in schema files. Validate by attempting operations that should fail due to constraints.

subtasks.title: Configure Row-Level Security (RLS) Policies
subtasks.description: Set up RLS policies for all multi-tenant tables to ensure data isolation and security.
subtasks.details: Define RLS policy standards. Implement policies in schema files. Validate by testing access with users from different teams.

subtasks.title: Set Up and Test Migrations
subtasks.description: Configure migration tools (Supabase CLI, Alembic) and ensure all schema changes are versioned and reproducible.
subtasks.details:
Document migration standards. Generate migration files using supabase db diff. Validate by running migrations on a fresh database and verifying schema state.
<info added on 2025-07-19T11:34:14.696Z>
## Testing Strategy for Database Schema Implementation

### Comprehensive Testing Guide

1. **Migration Testing**
   - Apply migrations to a clean database instance
   - Verify all tables, constraints, and indexes are created correctly
   - Test rollback functionality to ensure migrations can be reversed
   - Validate idempotency by running migrations multiple times

2. **Schema Validation**
   - Execute SQL queries to verify table structures match specifications
   - Check column data types, nullability constraints, and default values
   - Validate foreign key relationships between tables
   - Test unique constraints and indexes

3. **SQLAlchemy Model Testing**
   - Ensure ORM models correctly map to database tables
   - Test CRUD operations through SQLAlchemy models
   - Verify relationships are properly defined and navigable
   - Test transaction handling and rollback scenarios

4. **Row-Level Security Testing**
   - Create test users with different team affiliations
   - Attempt cross-tenant data access to verify isolation
   - Test RLS policies for each table with various user contexts
   - Verify administrative override functions correctly

5. **Data Integrity Testing**
   - Test cascading deletes and updates
   - Validate check constraints are enforced
   - Test edge cases with minimum/maximum values
   - Verify triggers and functions operate as expected

### Test Scripts

```sql
-- Sample validation queries
SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type, is_nullable 
FROM information_schema.columns 
WHERE table_schema = 'public';

-- Test RLS isolation
SET LOCAL ROLE test_user_team_1;
SELECT * FROM policy_rules; -- Should only see Team 1 data

-- Test relationships
SELECT v.id, p.name 
FROM violation_logs v 
JOIN policy_rules p ON v.policy_id = p.id 
LIMIT 10;
```
</info added on 2025-07-19T11:34:14.696Z>

subtasks.title: Seed Initial Data
subtasks.description: Create and execute seed scripts for essential reference data and test records.
subtasks.details: Define seed data standards. Implement seed scripts in SQL or TypeScript. Validate by querying seeded data after migration.

subtasks.title: Backup and Restore Procedures
subtasks.description: Establish and document backup and restore processes for the schema and data.
subtasks.details: Specify backup standards (frequency, format). Test by performing a backup and restoring to a new environment. Validate data integrity post-restore.

subtasks.title: ERD Documentation and Schema Standards
subtasks.description: Generate and maintain Entity-Relationship Diagrams (ERD) and document schema standards for ongoing reference.
subtasks.details: Use tools to auto-generate ERDs from schema files. Document naming conventions, data types, and relationship standards. Validate by peer review and ensuring ERD matches implemented schema.

tasks.title: Authentication and Authorization System
tasks.description: Implement user authentication and authorization using Clerk with role-based access control.
tasks.details:
1. Set up Clerk account and configure application
2. Implement user authentication flow with multi-factor authentication
3. Create role-based access control system with three roles: Admin, Member, Viewer
4. Implement JWT-based authentication for API endpoints
5. Create middleware for protecting routes based on user roles
6. Implement API key generation and validation for programmatic access
7. Set up API key rotation capabilities
8. Implement audit logging for all authentication and authorization events
9. Create user session management with proper timeout and refresh mechanisms
10. Implement RBAC permissions matrix in the database
11. Add user profile management functionality
tasks.testStrategy: Test user registration, login, and logout flows. Verify that MFA works correctly. Test role-based access by attempting to access restricted endpoints with different user roles. Verify API key authentication for programmatic access. Test audit logging by performing sensitive operations and checking log entries.

tasks.title: Core API Endpoints Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the core API endpoints as specified in the PRD using FastAPI.
tasks.details:
1. Set up FastAPI application structure with proper routing and dependency injection
2. Implement the following endpoints:
   - POST /api/policies/parse
   - GET /api/policies
   - POST /api/analyze
   - GET /api/violations
   - GET /api/usage
   - POST /api/integrations/slack
   - POST /api/integrations/github
3. Implement request validation using Pydantic models
4. Add error handling with appropriate HTTP status codes
5. Implement rate limiting using Redis
6. Add request logging and monitoring
7. Implement pagination for list endpoints
8. Add filtering and sorting capabilities
9. Document API using OpenAPI/Swagger
10. Implement CORS configuration for frontend access
tasks.testStrategy: Create unit tests for each endpoint using pytest. Test happy path and error scenarios. Verify rate limiting by making rapid requests. Test pagination by creating large datasets and retrieving pages. Validate request validation by sending malformed requests. Test CORS by making requests from different origins.

subtasks.title: Design API Routing Structure
subtasks.description: Organize FastAPI routers for policy parsing, violation detection, and integration management endpoints. Follow modular structure for scalability and maintainability.
subtasks.details: Use APIRouter for each logical group (e.g., policies, violations, integrations). Place routers in separate modules and include them in the main app as per FastAPI best practices[4].

subtasks.title: Define Pydantic Models for Request and Response Validation
subtasks.description: Create Pydantic models for all request bodies and responses for each endpoint, ensuring strict type validation and clear schema documentation.
subtasks.details: Define models for policy parsing input/output, violation reports, integration configs, etc. Use Pydantic's features for field validation and custom error messages[3].

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/policies/parse Endpoint
subtasks.description: Develop the endpoint to parse and validate policy definitions. Ensure request validation, error handling, and response serialization.
subtasks.details: Use async route handlers. Validate input with Pydantic. Return parsed policy or detailed error using HTTPException for invalid input[2][3].

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/policies Endpoint with Pagination and Filtering
subtasks.description: Develop endpoint to list policies with support for pagination, filtering, and sorting. Ensure query parameter validation.
subtasks.details: Accept query params for page, size, filters, and sort. Use Pydantic for query validation. Return paginated response. Handle edge cases (e.g., empty results, invalid params)[2][3].

subtasks.title: Implement POST /api/analyze Endpoint for Violation Detection
subtasks.description: Develop endpoint to analyze data against policies and detect violations. Validate input and return structured violation reports.
subtasks.details: Use Pydantic models for input/output. Handle analysis errors with proper HTTP status codes. Ensure async processing for scalability[3].

subtasks.title: Implement GET /api/violations Endpoint with Pagination and Filtering
subtasks.description: Develop endpoint to retrieve detected violations with pagination, filtering, and sorting support.
subtasks.details: Accept query params for pagination and filters. Validate with Pydantic. Return paginated list of violations. Handle empty and error cases gracefully[2][3].

subtasks.title: Implement Integration Management Endpoints (Slack/GitHub)
subtasks.description: Develop POST endpoints for Slack and GitHub integration management. Validate integration configs and handle errors.
subtasks.details: Use Pydantic models for integration payloads. Handle OAuth/token validation errors. Return clear success/error responses[2][3].

subtasks.title: Add Centralized Error Handling and Custom Exception Responses
subtasks.description: Implement global exception handlers for validation errors, HTTP exceptions, and unhandled errors. Ensure consistent error response format.
subtasks.details: Use FastAPI exception handlers. Return JSON with error code, message, and details. Map Pydantic and HTTPException errors to standard format[2][3].

subtasks.title: Implement Rate Limiting Middleware
subtasks.description: Add rate limiting to all endpoints using Redis backend. Return 429 errors on limit exceedance.
subtasks.details: Integrate rate limiting middleware. Configure per-endpoint and global limits. Test with rapid requests to ensure enforcement[1].

subtasks.title: Implement Logging, CORS, and Automated Test Coverage
subtasks.description: Add structured request/response logging, configure CORS, and write pytest-based unit tests for all endpoints and error scenarios.
subtasks.details: Use FastAPI logging best practices. Configure CORS for allowed origins. Write tests for happy/error paths, rate limiting, pagination, and CORS. Ensure >90% coverage[3].

tasks.title: OpenAI Integration for Policy Analysis
tasks.description: Implement integration with OpenAI GPT-4 API for policy document parsing and text analysis.
tasks.details:
1. Set up OpenAI API client with proper error handling and retry logic
2. Implement token usage optimization strategies
3. Create a service for policy document parsing using GPT-4
4. Implement text analysis service for compliance checking
5. Add caching layer using Redis to minimize redundant API calls
6. Implement fallback models (e.g., GPT-3.5-Turbo) for high availability
7. Create prompt templates for different analysis scenarios
8. Implement streaming responses for long-running analyses
9. Add token usage tracking and logging
10. Create rate limit handling with queuing mechanism
11. Implement context window optimization for large documents
tasks.testStrategy: Test policy parsing with sample documents of various formats. Verify text analysis with known compliant and non-compliant text. Test caching by making identical requests and ensuring OpenAI API is not called twice. Validate fallback mechanism by simulating OpenAI API failures. Test token usage tracking by comparing logged usage with actual OpenAI billing.

tasks.title: Policy Document Parsing Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the policy document parsing functionality that extracts structured rules from uploaded documents.
tasks.details:
1. Create file upload handler for PDF, DOCX, and plain text documents
2. Implement document text extraction using appropriate libraries (PyPDF2 for PDF, python-docx for DOCX)
3. Develop GPT-4 prompt engineering for rule extraction
4. Implement parsing logic to identify rules, keywords, and conditions
5. Create severity level assignment algorithm based on content analysis
6. Implement validation of extracted rules
7. Create storage mechanism for parsed rules in the database
8. Add support for document versioning
9. Implement progress tracking for long-running parsing jobs
10. Add error handling for malformed or unsupported documents
11. Optimize for documents up to 10MB as specified in the PRD
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various document formats and sizes. Verify rule extraction accuracy by comparing with manually identified rules. Test with documents containing known compliance requirements. Validate severity level assignment. Test with malformed documents to ensure proper error handling. Verify performance with documents approaching the 10MB limit.

tasks.title: Custom Rule Creation Interface
tasks.description: Implement the functionality for users to create custom compliance rules using natural language or JSON DSL.
tasks.details:
1. Design and implement the rule creation form in the frontend
2. Create backend endpoint for rule validation and storage
3. Implement natural language processing for converting user descriptions to structured rules
4. Develop JSON DSL schema for advanced rule creation
5. Implement rule validation logic
6. Create rule testing functionality with sample text
7. Add rule categorization and tagging
8. Implement rule versioning and history
9. Create rule duplication and editing capabilities
10. Add bulk rule import/export functionality
11. Implement rule search and filtering
tasks.testStrategy: Test rule creation with both natural language and JSON DSL inputs. Verify rule validation catches invalid rules. Test rule testing functionality with sample text containing violations and compliant content. Verify rule versioning preserves history. Test search and filtering capabilities with a large rule set.

tasks.title: Slack Integration Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the Slack integration for monitoring messages in real-time for policy violations.
tasks.details:
1. Create Slack App in Slack API developer portal
2. Implement OAuth 2.0 flow for workspace authorization
3. Set up event subscriptions for message events
4. Implement webhook handler for Slack events
5. Create message processing pipeline for policy compliance checking
6. Implement real-time violation detection using the analysis engine
7. Create notification system for violations
8. Add support for both public and private channels with proper permissions
9. Implement slash commands for manual compliance checks
10. Add context-aware violation recommendations
11. Implement user-friendly bot responses
12. Create channel and message filtering options
13. Ensure processing within 5 seconds as specified in the PRD
tasks.testStrategy: Test OAuth flow for connecting Slack workspaces. Verify event subscriptions by sending test messages. Test violation detection with messages containing known policy violations. Verify private channel access with proper permissions. Test slash commands for manual checks. Measure processing time to ensure it meets the 5-second requirement.

subtasks.title: Slack App Creation
subtasks.description: Register the Slack app in the Slack API developer portal, configure basic settings, and obtain client credentials.
subtasks.details: Define app name, description, and icon. Set up redirect URLs for OAuth. Configure required scopes for permissions. Store client ID and secret securely.

subtasks.title: OAuth 2.0 Flow Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement the OAuth 2.0 authorization flow to allow users to install the app in their Slack workspace.
subtasks.details: Use Slack's OAuth endpoints to request and exchange authorization codes for access tokens. Handle token storage and refresh securely. Validate state parameters to prevent CSRF.

subtasks.title: Event Subscriptions Setup
subtasks.description: Configure Slack event subscriptions to receive real-time message events from channels.
subtasks.details: Subscribe to relevant events (e.g., message.channels, message.groups, message.im, message.mpim) via the Events API. Validate event signatures using Slack's signing secret.

subtasks.title: Webhook Handler Implementation
subtasks.description: Develop a secure HTTP endpoint to receive and process Slack event payloads.
subtasks.details: Verify request signatures and timestamps. Respond to Slack's URL verification challenge. Ensure endpoint is resilient and responds within 3 seconds to avoid retries.

subtasks.title: Message Processing Pipeline
subtasks.description: Build a pipeline to analyze incoming messages for policy compliance using the analysis engine.
subtasks.details: Extract message content, user, and channel metadata. Pass data to the policy analysis service. Handle errors gracefully and log violations.

subtasks.title: Real-Time Violation Detection
subtasks.description: Integrate real-time detection logic to flag policy violations within the 5-second processing window.
subtasks.details: Optimize processing for low latency. Use asynchronous or streaming analysis if needed. Monitor processing times and implement fallback for slow responses.

subtasks.title: Violation Notification System
subtasks.description: Implement notification delivery to users or channels when a policy violation is detected.
subtasks.details: Use Slack Web API (chat.postMessage) to send alerts. Support ephemeral and public notifications. Ensure notifications respect channel and user privacy.

subtasks.title: Channel Permissions Management
subtasks.description: Ensure the app can access both public and private channels with appropriate permissions.
subtasks.details: Request necessary OAuth scopes (channels:history, groups:history, im:history, mpim:history). Handle permission errors and guide users to reauthorize if needed.

subtasks.title: Slash Command Support
subtasks.description: Add support for custom slash commands to trigger manual policy checks or retrieve violation reports.
subtasks.details: Register slash commands in the Slack app settings. Implement command handlers and validate user input. Secure endpoints to accept only Slack-verified requests.

subtasks.title: Policy Recommendations Engine
subtasks.description: Provide actionable recommendations or remediation steps when violations are detected.
subtasks.details: Integrate with the analysis engine to generate context-aware suggestions. Deliver recommendations via bot messages or modals.

subtasks.title: Bot Response Implementation
subtasks.description: Enable the bot to respond to direct mentions, DMs, or interactive components with helpful information.
subtasks.details: Listen for app_mention and message.im events. Use the Web API to send contextual responses. Support interactive elements (buttons, menus) for user engagement.

subtasks.title: Message Filtering and Rate Limiting
subtasks.description: Implement filtering to ignore irrelevant messages and enforce rate limits to comply with Slack API policies.
subtasks.details: Filter out bot messages, threads, or messages from excluded channels. Track API usage and implement exponential backoff on rate limit errors.

subtasks.title: Performance and Reliability Guarantees
subtasks.description: Establish monitoring and testing to ensure the integration meets the 5-second processing SLA and is robust under load.
subtasks.details: Set up automated tests for latency, error handling, and throughput. Monitor logs and metrics. Implement alerting for SLA breaches and fallback mechanisms.

tasks.title: GitHub Integration Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the GitHub integration for analyzing commits and pull requests for compliance violations.
tasks.details:
1. Create GitHub App with required permissions
2. Implement OAuth flow for repository authorization
3. Set up webhook handlers for commit and PR events
4. Create content extraction logic for commit diffs, PR descriptions, and code comments
5. Implement compliance analysis for extracted content
6. Create status checks API integration for PR blocking
7. Implement PR comments for violation notifications
8. Add support for multiple repositories per team
9. Create repository and branch filtering options
10. Implement violation severity-based actions (block merges for CRITICAL violations)
11. Add context-aware recommendations for fixing violations
12. Create repository settings management interface
tasks.testStrategy: Test GitHub App installation and OAuth flow. Verify webhook handlers by creating test commits and PRs. Test violation detection with content containing known policy violations. Verify PR blocking for critical violations. Test comment creation on PRs with violations. Verify multi-repository support by connecting multiple repositories.

tasks.title: Text Analysis API Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the API endpoint for ad-hoc compliance analysis of arbitrary text content.
tasks.details:
1. Create API endpoint for text analysis
2. Implement request validation for text content, source context, and policy scope
3. Create analysis pipeline using the OpenAI integration
4. Implement usage tracking for billing purposes
5. Add confidence score calculation for violations
6. Create recommendation generation for fixing violations
7. Implement response formatting with structured violation data
8. Add support for batch analysis of multiple text segments
9. Implement caching for identical content
10. Create performance optimizations to meet the 10-second response time requirement
11. Add support for text up to 50KB as specified in the PRD
tasks.testStrategy: Test with various text inputs including known compliant and non-compliant content. Verify usage tracking by analyzing text and checking usage logs. Test with text approaching the 50KB limit. Measure response time to ensure it meets the 10-second requirement. Verify confidence scores correlate with actual violation severity.

subtasks.title: API Endpoint Design and Creation
subtasks.description: Design and implement the REST API endpoint for ad-hoc text analysis, ensuring clear resource naming and HTTP method usage.
subtasks.details: Define endpoint path (e.g., POST /api/text-analysis), request/response schemas, and authentication (e.g., OAuth, API keys). Ensure endpoint supports both single and batch requests. Integration points: API gateway, authentication middleware. Performance criteria: Endpoint must handle concurrent requests efficiently and respond within 10 seconds for standard payloads.

subtasks.title: Request Validation Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement robust validation for incoming requests, including text content, source context, and policy scope.
subtasks.details: Validate required fields, enforce text size limits (e.g., 50KB), and check for valid policy identifiers. Return clear error messages for invalid input. Integration points: API middleware, schema validation libraries. Performance criteria: Validation should add minimal latency (<100ms) and prevent malformed requests from reaching the analysis pipeline.

subtasks.title: Analysis Pipeline Integration
subtasks.description: Develop the core analysis pipeline leveraging OpenAI or other NLP services for compliance checks.
subtasks.details: Orchestrate text preprocessing, policy rule matching, and AI model invocation. Support modular integration for future model upgrades. Integration points: OpenAI API, internal policy engine. Performance criteria: Pipeline must process standard requests within 8 seconds and scale horizontally.

subtasks.title: Usage Tracking and Billing
subtasks.description: Implement usage tracking for each analysis request to support billing and quota enforcement.
subtasks.details: Log request metadata (user, team, timestamp, text size, analysis type) to the database. Integrate with billing subsystem for quota checks. Integration points: Database (usage_logs), billing service. Performance criteria: Tracking must be reliable, atomic, and add <50ms overhead per request.

subtasks.title: Confidence Scoring Mechanism
subtasks.description: Add confidence score calculation for each detected violation using model outputs and rule heuristics.
subtasks.details: Aggregate model confidence scores and policy rule weights to produce a normalized confidence metric per violation. Integration points: Analysis pipeline, response formatter. Performance criteria: Scoring must be explainable and consistent across requests.

subtasks.title: Recommendation Generation
subtasks.description: Generate actionable recommendations for each violation to guide remediation.
subtasks.details: Map violation types to remediation templates or use AI to generate context-aware suggestions. Integration points: Policy engine, AI service. Performance criteria: Recommendations must be relevant, concise, and generated within 500ms per violation.

subtasks.title: Response Formatting and Structuring
subtasks.description: Format API responses with structured violation data, confidence scores, and recommendations.
subtasks.details: Define and implement a consistent JSON schema for responses, including metadata, violations, scores, and suggestions. Integration points: API controller, frontend consumers. Performance criteria: Responses must be well-structured, compact, and support versioning.

subtasks.title: Batch Analysis Support
subtasks.description: Extend the API to support batch analysis of multiple text segments in a single request.
subtasks.details: Accept arrays of text objects, process them in parallel, and return aggregated results. Handle partial failures gracefully. Integration points: Analysis pipeline, request validator. Performance criteria: Batch requests must process up to 100 segments within 10 seconds.

subtasks.title: Caching for Identical Requests
subtasks.description: Implement caching to avoid redundant analysis for identical text and policy combinations.
subtasks.details: Use a hash of text and policy as cache key. Store and retrieve analysis results from a fast in-memory store (e.g., Redis). Integration points: API controller, cache layer. Performance criteria: Cache hits must return results in <100ms; cache must be invalidated on policy updates.

subtasks.title: Performance Optimization
subtasks.description: Optimize the API and pipeline for low latency and high throughput.
subtasks.details: Profile and optimize code paths, enable asynchronous processing, and implement rate limiting. Integration points: API server, analysis pipeline, infrastructure monitoring. Performance criteria: 95th percentile response time <10 seconds for all supported payloads.

subtasks.title: Large Text Support
subtasks.description: Ensure robust handling of large text inputs up to the 50KB limit, including chunking and aggregation.
subtasks.details: Implement logic to split large texts into manageable chunks, analyze each, and aggregate results. Integration points: Request validator, analysis pipeline, response formatter. Performance criteria: Large texts must be processed within SLA, with results accurately merged and no data loss.

tasks.title: Violations Dashboard Frontend Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the web interface for displaying violation history and analytics.
tasks.details:
1. Create dashboard layout using React and Tailwind CSS
2. Implement violations table with pagination, sorting, and filtering
3. Create severity breakdown visualization using a chart library (e.g., Chart.js, Recharts)
4. Implement trend charts for violation metrics over time
5. Add date range selector for filtering data
6. Create filters for severity, source, and policy type
7. Implement violation detail view with context and recommendations
8. Add export functionality for CSV/PDF formats
9. Implement real-time updates using WebSockets
10. Create responsive design for mobile and tablet devices
11. Implement dark/light mode support
12. Add performance optimizations to meet the 3-second loading requirement
tasks.testStrategy: Test dashboard loading with various dataset sizes. Verify pagination, sorting, and filtering functionality. Test export functionality for CSV and PDF formats. Verify responsive design on different device sizes. Test dark/light mode switching. Measure loading time to ensure it meets the 3-second requirement.

tasks.title: Usage Monitoring Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the functionality to track and display API usage against billing limits.
tasks.details:
1. Create usage tracking service for API calls and token usage
2. Implement cost calculation based on usage metrics
3. Create usage dashboard with real-time updates
4. Implement historical usage trends visualization
5. Add cost projection based on current usage patterns
6. Create quota management system
7. Implement alerts for approaching quota limits (80% threshold as specified)
8. Add usage breakdown by integration type and endpoint
9. Create export functionality for usage reports
10. Implement usage-based recommendations for optimization
11. Add team-level and user-level usage tracking
tasks.testStrategy: Test usage tracking by making API calls and verifying logged usage. Test cost calculation with various usage patterns. Verify quota alerts by approaching the 80% threshold. Test historical trends with data spanning multiple time periods. Verify export functionality for usage reports.

tasks.title: Payment Processing with Stripe Integration
tasks.description: Implement payment processing functionality using Stripe for subscription management.
tasks.details:
1. Set up Stripe account and API integration
2. Implement subscription plans and pricing tiers
3. Create checkout flow for new subscriptions
4. Implement webhook handlers for Stripe events
5. Create billing portal for subscription management
6. Implement usage-based billing calculations
7. Add invoice generation and management
8. Create payment method management interface
9. Implement subscription upgrade/downgrade functionality
10. Add trial period management
11. Create billing history and receipt generation
12. Implement tax calculation and reporting
tasks.testStrategy: Test subscription creation with Stripe test mode. Verify webhook handlers by triggering test events. Test billing portal functionality for managing subscriptions. Verify usage-based billing calculations with various usage patterns. Test invoice generation and payment processing.

tasks.title: User Onboarding Flow Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the guided setup wizard and onboarding experience for new users.
tasks.details:
1. Design and implement multi-step onboarding wizard
2. Create team creation and management functionality
3. Implement initial policy configuration steps
4. Create integration setup tutorials for Slack and GitHub
5. Implement sample policies and test scenarios
6. Create interactive product tours for key features
7. Add progress tracking for onboarding completion
8. Implement email notifications for onboarding steps
9. Create team invitation system
10. Add contextual help and documentation
11. Implement onboarding analytics tracking
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete onboarding flow from registration to completion. Verify team creation and invitation functionality. Test integration setup tutorials with actual connections. Verify sample policies work correctly for testing. Test interactive product tours for all key features.

tasks.title: Error Handling and Monitoring System
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive error handling, logging, and monitoring across the platform.
tasks.details:
1. Implement structured logging using JSON format
2. Set up Sentry integration for error tracking
3. Create custom error classes and handlers
4. Implement user-facing error messages with actionable steps
5. Create graceful degradation for service unavailability
6. Implement retry mechanisms for transient failures
7. Add fallback content when data cannot be loaded
8. Set up health check endpoints for all services
9. Implement distributed tracing for request flow analysis
10. Create alert configuration for different severity levels
11. Implement error reporting and analytics dashboard
tasks.testStrategy: Test error handling by triggering various error conditions. Verify Sentry captures errors correctly. Test graceful degradation by simulating service outages. Verify retry mechanisms work for transient failures. Test health check endpoints for accurate status reporting.

tasks.title: Analytics and Metrics Implementation
tasks.description: Implement analytics tracking and reporting for product and technical metrics.
tasks.details:
1. Set up analytics tracking for user engagement metrics
2. Implement feature adoption tracking
3. Create session duration and page view monitoring
4. Implement user retention cohort analysis
5. Create business metrics dashboard (MRR, CAC, LTV, churn)
6. Implement performance monitoring for API endpoints
7. Create error rate tracking and classification
8. Implement database query performance monitoring
9. Add third-party service latency tracking
10. Create policy effectiveness analytics
11. Implement false positive rate tracking
12. Add integration health monitoring
tasks.testStrategy: Test analytics tracking by performing various user actions. Verify business metrics calculations with test data. Test performance monitoring by making API requests and checking metrics. Verify error rate tracking by triggering errors. Test policy effectiveness analytics with known violation scenarios.

subtasks.title: Engagement Tracking Implementation
subtasks.description: Instrument the application to collect user engagement events (clicks, scrolls, interactions).
subtasks.details: Define key engagement events. Integrate event tracking SDKs or custom code. Store events in a centralized data warehouse. Visualize engagement metrics in dashboards. Set up scheduled reports for stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Feature Adoption Analytics
subtasks.description: Track usage of new and existing features to measure adoption rates.
subtasks.details: Identify features to track. Add instrumentation to log feature usage. Store adoption data in analytics tables. Visualize adoption trends over time. Generate periodic adoption reports.

subtasks.title: Session and Page Monitoring
subtasks.description: Monitor session durations and page views for user activity analysis.
subtasks.details: Implement session tracking logic. Collect page view events. Store session and page data in time-series tables. Visualize session lengths and page popularity. Report on session trends and anomalies.

subtasks.title: Retention Cohort Analysis
subtasks.description: Analyze user retention using cohort-based metrics.
subtasks.details: Define cohort criteria (signup date, feature usage). Collect retention events. Store cohort data in analytics warehouse. Visualize retention curves and cohort comparisons. Schedule retention reports.

subtasks.title: Business Metrics Dashboard
subtasks.description: Develop dashboards for key business metrics (MRR, CAC, LTV, churn).
subtasks.details: Define business metric formulas. Aggregate data from billing, CRM, and usage sources. Store metrics in summary tables. Build interactive dashboards for business stakeholders. Automate monthly and quarterly reports.

subtasks.title: API Performance Monitoring
subtasks.description: Track and analyze API endpoint performance metrics.
subtasks.details: Instrument API endpoints to log response times and throughput. Store performance logs in a time-series database. Visualize API latency and error rates. Set up alerts for performance degradation. Generate weekly performance reports.

subtasks.title: Error Rate Tracking and Classification
subtasks.description: Monitor and classify application and API errors.
subtasks.details: Capture error events with context (endpoint, user, stack trace). Store errors in a centralized error log. Visualize error rates by type and endpoint. Classify errors for root cause analysis. Report on error trends and critical incidents.

subtasks.title: Database Performance Monitoring
subtasks.description: Monitor database query performance and resource utilization.
subtasks.details: Enable query logging and performance metrics collection. Store query stats in a monitoring database. Visualize slow queries and resource bottlenecks. Set up alerts for performance thresholds. Provide regular DB health reports.

subtasks.title: Third-Party Service Latency Tracking
subtasks.description: Track latency and reliability of third-party integrations.
subtasks.details: Instrument calls to external services to log response times and failures. Store latency data in a monitoring system. Visualize third-party performance over time. Alert on SLA breaches. Report on integration health and issues.

subtasks.title: Policy Effectiveness Analytics
subtasks.description: Analyze the effectiveness of compliance and security policies.
subtasks.details: Collect policy violation and enforcement events. Store analytics in policy-specific tables. Visualize policy impact and compliance rates. Report on policy effectiveness and areas for improvement.

subtasks.title: False Positive Tracking
subtasks.description: Track and analyze false positive rates in detection systems.
subtasks.details: Log flagged events and user feedback on false positives. Store data in a dedicated analytics table. Visualize false positive rates by rule and context. Report on trends and recommend tuning actions.

subtasks.title: Integration Health Monitoring
subtasks.description: Monitor the health and status of all system integrations.
subtasks.details: Collect heartbeat and status events from integrations. Store health data in a monitoring database. Visualize integration uptime and failure incidents. Set up alerts for integration outages. Provide integration health summary reports.

tasks.title: Accessibility Compliance Implementation
tasks.description: Implement accessibility features to ensure WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across the platform.
tasks.details:
1. Conduct accessibility audit of all UI components
2. Implement proper semantic HTML structure
3. Add ARIA attributes where necessary
4. Ensure proper color contrast ratios
5. Implement keyboard navigation support
6. Add screen reader compatibility
7. Create focus management for interactive elements
8. Implement skip navigation links
9. Add text alternatives for non-text content
10. Create accessible form validation and error messages
11. Implement responsive design for various devices
12. Add accessibility testing to CI/CD pipeline
tasks.testStrategy: Test with screen readers to verify compatibility. Verify keyboard navigation works for all interactive elements. Test color contrast with automated tools. Verify form validation is accessible. Test with various browsers and assistive technologies to ensure broad compatibility.

tasks.title: Data Protection and Privacy Features
tasks.description: Implement data protection features including encryption, PII detection, and compliance with privacy regulations.
tasks.details:
1. Implement encryption at rest for sensitive data
2. Configure TLS 1.3 for all data in transit
3. Create PII detection and masking in violation logs
4. Implement data retention policies
5. Create data export functionality for GDPR compliance
6. Implement right to be forgotten (data deletion)
7. Add consent management for data processing
8. Create privacy policy and terms of service documents
9. Implement data processing records for compliance
10. Add data access logs for audit purposes
11. Create data breach notification system
12. Implement geographic data storage controls for regional compliance
tasks.testStrategy: Verify encryption at rest by examining database storage. Test PII detection with sample data containing personal information. Verify data export functionality provides complete user data. Test data deletion to ensure all user data is removed. Verify consent management works correctly for various scenarios.

subtasks.title: Encryption at Rest Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement encryption for all sensitive data stored in databases and file systems.
subtasks.details: Use industry-standard encryption algorithms (e.g., AES-256) for data at rest. Ensure encryption keys are securely managed and rotated. Align with GDPR's recommendation for encryption and pseudonymization as technical measures. Validate by reviewing database storage, inspecting encryption settings, and conducting penetration tests.

subtasks.title: TLS Configuration for Data in Transit
subtasks.description: Configure TLS 1.3 for all network communications to protect data in transit.
subtasks.details: Enforce TLS 1.3 for all APIs and web interfaces. Disable insecure protocols and ciphers. Test using SSL/TLS scanning tools. Ensure compliance with GDPR's requirement for appropriate technical measures to secure personal data.

subtasks.title: PII Detection and Masking
subtasks.description: Implement automated detection and masking of personally identifiable information (PII) in logs and data stores.
subtasks.details: Deploy PII detection tools to scan logs and databases. Mask or redact PII in violation logs and audit trails. Validate by inserting test data with PII and verifying detection and masking. Ensure compliance with GDPR and CCPA requirements for protecting personal data.

subtasks.title: Data Retention Policy Enforcement
subtasks.description: Define and enforce data retention policies for all personal and sensitive data.
subtasks.details: Document retention periods based on regulatory requirements (GDPR, CCPA). Automate deletion or anonymization of data after retention period expires. Test by simulating data lifecycle and verifying timely deletion. Maintain audit logs of retention actions.

subtasks.title: Data Export Functionality
subtasks.description: Implement user-facing data export features for GDPR/CCPA compliance.
subtasks.details: Allow users to request and receive a complete export of their personal data in a machine-readable format. Ensure exports include all relevant data and are securely delivered. Test by requesting exports and verifying completeness and accuracy.

subtasks.title: Right to Be Forgotten (Data Deletion)
subtasks.description: Enable users to request deletion of their personal data in compliance with GDPR/CCPA.
subtasks.details: Implement workflows to identify and delete all user data upon request. Ensure deletion propagates to backups and third-party processors. Validate by submitting deletion requests and confirming data removal across all systems.

subtasks.title: Consent Management System
subtasks.description: Develop a system to capture, manage, and demonstrate user consent for data processing.
subtasks.details: Implement granular consent capture with clear, plain language. Allow users to withdraw consent at any time. Store consent records for auditability. Test by simulating consent flows and verifying records. Align with GDPR's strict consent requirements.

subtasks.title: Privacy Policy and Terms Documentation
subtasks.description: Draft and maintain comprehensive privacy policy and terms of service documents.
subtasks.details: Ensure documentation covers data collection, processing, sharing, user rights, and security measures. Update regularly to reflect changes in practices or regulations. Validate by legal review and user accessibility checks. Required by both GDPR and CCPA.

subtasks.title: Data Processing Records
subtasks.description: Maintain detailed records of all data processing activities as required by GDPR/CPRA.
subtasks.details: Document purposes, categories, recipients, retention periods, and security measures for each processing activity. Use automated tools for record-keeping where possible. Validate by internal audits and regulatory readiness checks.

subtasks.title: Access Logs and Audit Trails
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive logging of data access and processing events.
subtasks.details: Log all access to personal and sensitive data, including user ID, timestamp, and action. Protect logs from tampering and ensure retention aligns with policy. Test by reviewing logs for completeness and accuracy. Required for auditability under GDPR/CCPA.

subtasks.title: Breach Notification Procedures
subtasks.description: Establish and test procedures for timely data breach detection and notification.
subtasks.details: Implement monitoring for unauthorized access or data exfiltration. Define escalation and notification workflows to meet GDPR's 72-hour requirement. Test with simulated breach scenarios and review notification timelines and content.

subtasks.title: Geographic Data Controls
subtasks.description: Implement controls to restrict and manage data storage and processing by geographic region.
subtasks.details: Ensure data residency requirements are met (e.g., EU data stays in EU). Use geo-fencing and region-specific storage solutions. Validate by reviewing data flows and storage locations. Align with GDPR cross-border transfer rules.

tasks.title: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Implement performance optimizations to meet the response time targets specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
1. Implement database query optimization with proper indexing
2. Add caching layer using Redis for frequently accessed data
3. Implement frontend bundle optimization (code splitting, lazy loading)
4. Create API response compression
5. Implement database connection pooling
6. Add server-side rendering for critical pages
7. Create image and asset optimization pipeline
8. Implement CDN integration for static assets
9. Add database read replicas for query distribution
10. Create query batching and DataLoader implementation
11. Implement WebSocket connection pooling
12. Add performance monitoring and alerting
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct load testing to verify performance under various conditions. Measure response times for all critical endpoints. Test caching effectiveness by making repeated requests. Verify frontend loading times on various devices and network conditions. Test database performance with large datasets.

tasks.title: Deployment Pipeline Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the deployment pipeline for staging and production environments as specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
1. Set up Vercel for frontend deployment
2. Configure Railway for backend deployment
3. Implement multi-region deployment with load balancing for production
4. Create Terraform scripts for infrastructure provisioning
5. Implement blue-green deployment strategy
6. Add environment-specific configuration management
7. Create database migration automation
8. Implement rollback capabilities for failed deployments
9. Add deployment approval workflows
10. Create deployment notifications
11. Implement deployment health checks
12. Add performance regression testing in deployment pipeline
tasks.testStrategy: Test the complete deployment pipeline from commit to production. Verify blue-green deployments work without downtime. Test rollback functionality by triggering a failed deployment. Verify multi-region deployment with traffic distribution. Test database migrations during deployment.

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing Implementation
tasks.description: Implement the testing strategy as specified in the PRD, including unit, integration, and end-to-end testing.
tasks.details:
1. Set up unit testing framework for backend (pytest)
2. Implement component testing for frontend (React Testing Library)
3. Create API endpoint testing suite
4. Implement mock services for OpenAI, Stripe, and third-party APIs
5. Set up end-to-end testing with Playwright
6. Create integration tests for service dependencies
7. Implement database integration tests with fixtures
8. Add webhook testing with ngrok and test payloads
9. Create performance testing scenarios
10. Implement security scanning for vulnerabilities
11. Add pre-commit hooks for code quality checks
12. Create test coverage reporting and monitoring
tasks.testStrategy: Verify unit tests achieve 80%+ code coverage for core business logic. Test component rendering and interactions. Verify API endpoints handle various scenarios correctly. Test end-to-end workflows across the entire application. Verify security scanning catches known vulnerabilities.

tasks.title: Documentation System Implementation
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive documentation for the platform, including API docs, user guides, and developer documentation.
tasks.details:
1. Create OpenAPI/Swagger documentation for all API endpoints
2. Implement interactive API playground
3. Create user guides for all major features
4. Implement in-app contextual help system
5. Create developer documentation for integrations
6. Add code examples for common use cases
7. Implement documentation versioning
8. Create troubleshooting guides and FAQs
9. Add video tutorials for key workflows
10. Implement feedback mechanism for documentation
11. Create changelog and release notes system
12. Add documentation search functionality
tasks.testStrategy: Verify API documentation accuracy by testing endpoints against the docs. Test interactive API playground with various requests. Verify user guides cover all major features. Test in-app help system for context-awareness. Verify documentation search returns relevant results.

tasks.title: Security Hardening and Penetration Testing
tasks.description: Implement security best practices and conduct penetration testing to identify and address vulnerabilities.
tasks.details:
1. Implement security headers (CSP, HSTS, etc.)
2. Add rate limiting for authentication endpoints
3. Implement input validation and sanitization
4. Create SQL injection prevention measures
5. Add XSS protection mechanisms
6. Implement CSRF protection
7. Create secure cookie handling
8. Add dependency vulnerability scanning
9. Implement secrets management
10. Create security incident response plan
11. Conduct penetration testing
12. Implement security recommendations from penetration testing
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct security scanning with tools like OWASP ZAP. Test for common vulnerabilities including XSS, CSRF, and SQL injection. Verify rate limiting prevents brute force attacks. Test dependency scanning catches known vulnerabilities. Conduct manual penetration testing to identify security issues.

tasks.title: Scalability Testing and Optimization
tasks.description: Conduct scalability testing and implement optimizations to meet the scalability targets specified in the PRD.
tasks.details:
1. Create load testing scenarios for concurrent users
2. Implement API throughput testing
3. Conduct database scalability testing
4. Create multi-team isolation testing
5. Implement horizontal scaling for API servers
6. Add database sharding strategy
7. Create caching strategy for high-traffic scenarios
8. Implement queue-based processing for background tasks
9. Add auto-scaling configuration
10. Create performance monitoring for scalability metrics
11. Implement resource utilization optimization
12. Add capacity planning tools and dashboards
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct load testing with simulated traffic matching scalability targets. Test concurrent user scenarios with up to 1,000 simultaneous users. Verify API throughput meets the 10,000 requests per minute target. Test database performance with large datasets. Verify multi-team isolation with simulated multi-tenant workloads.

tasks.title: Launch Readiness and Go-Live Preparation
tasks.description: Prepare for product launch by completing final checks, documentation, and go-to-market activities.
tasks.details:
1. Create launch checklist covering all technical and business requirements
2. Implement final security audit
3. Conduct performance testing under expected launch conditions
4. Create backup and disaster recovery procedures
5. Implement monitoring and alerting for production
6. Create customer support processes and documentation
7. Implement feedback collection mechanisms
8. Create onboarding materials for initial customers
9. Implement analytics for tracking launch metrics
10. Create communication plan for launch announcements
11. Implement feature flagging for gradual rollout
12. Create post-launch monitoring dashboard
tasks.testStrategy: Conduct end-to-end testing of the complete platform. Verify all launch criteria are met. Test backup and disaster recovery procedures. Verify monitoring and alerting work correctly in production-like environment. Test customer support processes with simulated support scenarios.
